message:
🐛 Fix WVA nightlies to use consolidated test suite (#863)

The deprecated test/e2e-openshift/ suite was removed in
llm-d/llm-d-workload-variant-autoscaler#787. Switch both WVA nightly
test_target values from test-e2e-openshift to test-e2e-full which runs
the consolidated test/e2e/ suite.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -125,5 +125,5 @@ jobs:
       skip_cleanup: ${{ github.event.inputs.skip_cleanup == 'true' }}
       required_gpus: 2
       recommended_gpus: 4
-      test_target: test-e2e-openshift
+      test_target: test-e2e-full
     secrets: inherit

@@ -126,5 +126,5 @@ jobs:
       skip_cleanup: ${{ github.event.inputs.skip_cleanup == 'true' }}
       required_gpus: 2
       recommended_gpus: 4
-      test_target: test-e2e-openshift
+      test_target: test-e2e-full
     secrets: inherit
